BambooPole.description: Use in the water to catch fish.

TrainingRod.description: It's a lot easier to use than other rods, but can only catch basic fish.

FiberglassRod.description: Use in the water to catch fish.

IridiumRod.description: Use in the water to catch fish.

AdvancedIridiumRod.description: Use in the water to catch fish. Up to two bobbers can be attached at once.

Hoe.description: Used to dig and till soil.

CopperHoe.description: Used to dig and till soil.

SteelHoe.description: Used to dig and till soil.

GoldHoe.description: Used to dig and till soil.

IridiumHoe.description: Used to dig and till soil.

Pan.description: Use to gather ore from streams.

SteelPan.description: Use to gather ore from streams. Has bigger and better yields than a copper pan. It also has a small chance to immediately cause another panning spot to appear.

GoldPan.description: Use to gather ore from streams. Has bigger and better yields than a steel pan. It also has a small chance to immediately cause another panning spot to appear.

IridiumPan.description: Use to gather ore from streams. Has the best yields of any pan. It also has a chance to immediately cause another panning spot to appear.

ReturnScepter.description: The golden handle quivers with raw potential. Hold this scepter to the sky and return home at will.

Shears.description: Use this to collect wool from sheep.

WateringCan.description: Used to water crops. It can be refilled at any water source.

CopperWateringCan.description: Used to water crops. It can be refilled at any water source.

SteelWateringCan.description: Used to water crops. It can be refilled at any water source.

GoldWateringCan.description: Used to water crops. It can be refilled at any water source.

IridiumWateringCan.description: Used to water crops. It can be refilled at any water source.

CopperTrashCan.description: When trashing an item, you reclaim 15% of the value.

SteelTrashCan.description: When trashing an item, you reclaim 30% of the value.

GoldTrashCan.description: When trashing an item, you reclaim 45% of the value.

IridiumTrashCan.description: When trashing an item, you reclaim 60% of the value.
